violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw whole meat cuts had packaged potatoes stored directly on top of and touching on the side in the left reach in cooler in the kitchen. Flats of shell eggs, removed from the original package, were stored above bags of cheese and lettuce in the right reach in cooler in the kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken and missing floor tile by the front cold hold unit.
